title: Steel Refuses to Break
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on steel refuses to break, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Steel Refuses to Break. Zoro fights Mr. 1 and begins confronting the challenge of cutting steel itself. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Mr. 4 doesn't even have one small lump on his head!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Wait, wait, wait, that ain't normal... How can someone be completely unharmed after being hit in the head with a 5 ton hammer?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: 'Course it's fake! You really think I could lift 5 freakin' Tons!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I give up tryin' to lift anything heavier than 5 kg!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: What's she plain' to do this time!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: She dug up a new hole!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: Digging for me is as easy as swimming is for a fish!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: You two take care of that reindeer- human!

summary: This part develops steel refuses to break and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
